input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.10.4.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.10.4.2
            TITLE: idle test speed

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.10.4.2: Idle Test Speed
IN.10.4.2 Idle Test Speed 
a. Determined by the vehicle’s calibrated idle speed 
b. If the idle speed varies then the vehicle will be tested across the range of idle speeds 
determined by the team

final_answer: rule IN.10.4.2: Idle Test Speed IN.10.4.2 Idle Test Speed a. Determined by the vehicle’s calibrated idle speed b. If the idle speed varies then the vehicle will be tested across the range of idle speeds determined by the team
